weapons.name: Cleansing flame
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, Flames, Shield breaker(-1), Soul burn(5+)

weapons.name: Digital weapons
weapons.abilities: Extra Attack, Hits automatically wound the target

weapons.name: Malleus Argyrum
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Slow(-2)

weapons.name: Titansword
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Unique. Only for Captains.

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.description: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Astartes bionics
equipment.description: The model gains the "Warded" ability.

equipment.name: Augurium scrolls
equipment.description: One melee weapon gains "Life curse".

equipment.name: Bone Shard of a Grand Master
equipment.description: Once per game, the model may gain a 3+ invulnerability save until the start of its next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Brotherhood banner
equipment.description: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unit gain +1 Attack. Only for Ancients.

equipment.name: Cuirass of Sacrifice
equipment.description: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique.

equipment.name: Deimos masterwork
equipment.description: One ranged weapon gains "Precision(5+)". Unique.

equipment.name: Domina Liber Daemonica
equipment.description: The model re-rolls 1s for tests to manifest or deny psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Familiar
equipment.description: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: First to the Fray
equipment.description: The model must start the game in reserve and will arrive automatically in the first turn (together with its attached unit). They do not count towards the limit of how many units may enter from reserves each round. Must be the first activation of the player. Unique

equipment.name: Grimoire of True Names
equipment.description: One model in direct base contact suffers -1 penalties to its WS, Initiatives and Attacks, up to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Gyrotemporal vault
equipment.description: If the model successfully manifested a psychic power during its activation, it gains +1 Initiative unti the beginning of its next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Hexagram warding runes
equipment.description: Enemy models in direct base contact suffer a -1 penalty to their invulnerability saves.

equipment.name: Inescapable Wrath
equipment.description: The model and its attached unit gain "Frenzy(2")". Unique.

equipment.name: Iron halo
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Librum Arcana
equipment.description: The model knows all psychic power from any discipline it would normally have access to. Unique. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Mandulian Reliquary
equipment.description: The model and its attached unit gain the "Objective secured!" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 to its Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.description: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Personal teleporter
equipment.description: The model gains +6" movement and the "Jump pack" and "Shunt" abilities (See Interceptor Squad). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Protection balm
equipment.description: The model gains "Aegis(4+)".

equipment.name: Psy-ammunition
equipment.description: All ranged weapon of the model gain +1 Strength. Only works on weapons with Strength 4 or below.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.description: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Purity Seals
equipment.description: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Radiant Champion
equipment.description: All melee weapons of the model gain "Soul burn(5+)". Unique. Only for Brotherhood-Champion.

equipment.name: Refractor field
equipment.description: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Relic helm
equipment.description: The model can manifest and deny an additional psychic power per turn. Unique.

equipment.name: Sacred weapon
equipment.description:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Selfless healer
equipment.description: At the end of its movement, the model can attempt to heal a creature within 3". On a 4+, a model regains up to 1 lost Wound. Only for Apothecaries. Unique.

equipment.name: Soul imprint
equipment.description: One melee weapon gains "Shred". Unique.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.description: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 to its Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.description: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep Strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: The Emperor's Tarot
equipment.description: Once per game, the own Initiative roll may be re-rolled. Unique.

equipment.name: The Strands of Fate
equipment.description: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.description: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Truesilver armor
equipment.description: The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

equipment.name: Warden of the Blade
equipment.description: Increase the Ld of the model by 1. Additionally, it gains the "Cleansing flame" weapon. Unique. Only for Brotherhood-Champion.

veteran_abilities.name: Favoured enemy
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

veteran_abilities.name: Furious charge
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

veteran_abilities.name: Tank hunter
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

veteran_abilities.name: Terrain expert
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

veteran_abilities.name: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT
veteran_abilities.description: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT

veteran_abilities.name: Additional armor
veteran_abilities.description: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

veteran_abilities.name: Hunter-killer missile
veteran_abilities.description: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

veteran_abilities.name: Improved targeting
veteran_abilities.description: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

veteran_abilities.name: Jammer
veteran_abilities.description: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

veteran_abilities.name: Machine spirit
veteran_abilities.description: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 3+.

veteran_abilities.name: Ordained hull
veteran_abilities.description: Enemy units must pass a Leadership test if they want to charge the unit. If they fail the test, another target may be selected.

veteran_abilities.name: Psy-ammunition
veteran_abilities.description: All ranged weapon of the model gain +1 Strength. Only works on weapons with Strength 4 or below.

veteran_abilities.name: Smoke Launcher
veteran_abilities.description:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.
